name: HRT_LANG_KEYWORDS_VL
query: SELECT LKB.KEYWORD_ID, LKB.ENTERPRISE_ID, LKB.SUGGESTION_ID, LKB.KEYWORD_CODE, LKB.SUPPLIER_CODE, LKTL.KEYWORDS, LKB.MODULE_ID, LKB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, LKB.CREATED_BY, LKB.CREATION_DATE, LKB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LKB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, LKB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, LKB.STATUS_CODE FROM HRT_LANG_KEYWORDS_B LKB, HRT_LANG_KEYWORDS_TL LKTL WHERE LKB.KEYWORD_ID = LKTL.KEYWORD_ID AND LKB.ENTERPRISE_ID = LKTL.ENTERPRISE_ID AND LKTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
